title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
